notes: Per-species iconography phrases consulted by the minimalist-tshirt engine. Phrases are positive compositional anchors appended after master citations and before universal negatives. Source: docs/QUALITY_FINDINGS_2026-05-20.md, 'Per-species iconography (Lever B) - first draft' section.

tiger.identity: amber-gold eyes with vertical slit pupils; sharp white ocelli behind both ears; 8-12 long pale whiskers per side; rust-orange body with broken vertical black stripes; pale belly fur

peacock.identity: iridescent blue-green neck; ocellus eye-spots on tail feathers; crest of small fan feathers on head; bright orange feet

elephant.identity: small alert eyes with long lashes; trunk with visible ring lines; tusks (for males) or short tushes; broad triangular ears; wrinkled grey skin texture

cobra.identity: flared hood with two oval black eye-spots; forked tongue mid-flicker; pale belly scales; defined diamond head

fish.identity: large round eyes; gill plates clearly delineated; layered overlapping scales; paired fins + tail

horse.identity: bright forward-set eyes; long mane and tail in continuous strokes; visible muscle lines on flank

deer.identity: large dark eyes; white throat patch; branching antlers (males) or smooth poll (females); slender legs

parrot.identity: strong curved beak; visible cere above beak; long pointed tail feathers; defined wing bars

turtle.identity: geometric scute pattern on shell; lined skin folds at neck; webbed feet

lion.identity: round eyes with golden iris; full ringed mane (males); muscular shoulder; tufted tail tip
